summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ExpertOpinion marketplace MVP. Backend APIs mostly functional (93.8% success rate), frontend UI working with role-based dashboards. Found critical issue creation bug and minor UI issues.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 error when creating new issues due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization error
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks core functionality - clients cannot post new issues

ui_bugs.issue: City dropdown selection not working properly in registration form

console_errors.issue: React Select.Item must have a value prop error

working_features: Landing page with hero section, categories, how-it-works
Login functionality for all user types
Admin dashboard with stats and user management

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections

critical: Fix MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in issue creation endpoint (/api/issues POST)
Fix city selection dropdown in registration form
medium: Resolve React Select component console errors
Test and fix issue posting flow end-to-end
Test offer creation and booking flow
low: Improve error handling in frontend forms
Add better loading states for async operations
